payload.answer: Unsupported as a durable memory claim. The evidence only supports “no conflicts recorded” if conflict links were actually checked; that verification is not established here.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity-specific fact is supported; the claim depends on unverified conflict-link checking.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether the absence claim “No conflicts recorded” is grounded in the available evidence.

details: Absence claim is not grounded without evidence of conflict-link checking.
No memory card committed to avoid overclaiming.

repair_options: Verify conflict links before asserting that no conflicts were recorded.
If verification cannot be confirmed, store only a qualified note such as “no conflicts recorded in the examined source(s)”.
